summary: Build W14 — test week, ~20 mi. Wed mid-build test (3K TT or 4x1 mi @ T, §10) arbitrates the held T pace (should feel exactly RPE 7; RPE 8+ -> drop 10 s/mi, Adj #166) and forces the calendar-placement call — two spare weeks W13->W25 vs race 10-24 (Adj #167). Bump slate Tue: incline 150->155 (Adj #168), pushdown 27.5 attempt pain-gated (Adj #183). Hill strides return Mon after 4 weeks off (Adj #167). Sat is all holds/rebuilds — no scheduled bump.

days.session: Z1 easy 35 min + hill strides 6-8 x 10-12 s @ 4-6%
days.note: First hill-stride dose since W10 Mon 6-22 (Adj #167) — start at 6 reps, walk-down rec. Easy 9:15-10:30/mi, conversation-gated (Adj #176).

days.session: Hyp A — incline 155 bump + pushdown 27.5 attempt
days.note: Bumps: incline 150->155 (1x5 @ 155 + AMRAP @ 135; 155x5 at <=RIR 1 -> back to 150, Adj #168); pushdown 25->27.5 attempt, pain-gated (Adj #183). Holds: preacher 70 (75-eligible on an Adj #150-shape outing), DB lat 30 (firm opener opens the bump talk, Adj #169), rear-delt 135 (repeat RIR 4 opener -> nudge 140, Adj #173), crunch +10 rebuild to 3x12 (Adj #172).

days.session: W14 mid-build test: 3K TT or 4x1 mi @ T (§10)
days.note: T should feel exactly RPE 7 — RPE 8+ -> drop paces 10 s/mi (Adj #166). Treadmill quality at 1% incline if indoors (Adj #177). Calendar-placement decision due by this test (Adj #167).

days.session: Off — mobility / walk, daily SI prehab

days.note: Second I-pace dose — keep all reps in-band 7:10-7:25, no off-band closer (Adj #178); the fast end is earned after this session lands (Adj #176).

days.session: Long 60 min Z1 AM + Hyp B PM (>=6h gap)
days.note: No scheduled bumps — row 80 re-earn the ladder (Adj #180); calf 355 rebuild, AM-gated (Adj #185); lat 165 bump-eligible 170 on a clean 4x8 with set 3 RIR 1 (Adj #179); DB lat 35 rebuild (Adj #181); preacher 60 (Adj #182); crunch +10, set 3 the gap (Adj #184). Pushdown load depends on Tue's 27.5 attempt (Adj #183).
Tyler twists 3x15 + reverse Tyler 3x15, McGill Big 3 5-3-1, daily SI prehab. Walking fine.
